reviews.text:
Worst attorney I’ve ever come across !
Absolutely the worst most unprofessional attorney ever . Even chose to dox my personal phone number address and email to absusive ex husband as her last little juvenile act on the way out . She makes up ridiculous bills and charges for doing nothing. I highly recommend you do NOT ever use her . Her staff was kind and professional she however is like High school Mean girls . The bar association wasted no time sending me the paperwork after I explained them the things she has done .
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Lesley! Thank you for taking the time to share your concerns. I’m very sorry to hear you had a negative experience — that is not the standard of service we strive to provide. Unless there is some kind of finding of domestic violence by a court of law, then when an attorney withdraws, per the Alaska Rules of Professional Conduct, specifically Rule 81, "the attorney shall certify to the court that the attorney has complied with the requirements for service of the motion and shall provide the court with the party’s last known address, telephone number, and email address."  It's actually part of the rules of professional conduct to provide a party's contact information to the court, including phone number, address, and email! Regarding your concerns about making up "ridiculous bills," I would be happy to address each billing statement with you and explain the way we carefully document billing at the firm.

reviews.text: Good attitude and professional services

Carolyn is a compassionate and highly professional family law attorney who truly cares about her clients. She made a difficult process much easier by being clear, supportive, and attentive throughout. Her staff was also incredibly helpful and kind, always responsive and reassuring. I’m very grateful for Carolyn and her team and would gladly recommend them.
Nicole has represented a family member for a few years in a divorce. She is unprofessional, unprepared, and unresponsive. If you want a good attorney, keep looking!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Mr. Hinckley, I am not sure which case you are referring to but feel free to have your family member reach out to us directly so we can resolve his/her concerns and set him/her up with an attorney that is a better fit. Family law matters are often high conflict and clients can often be distressed with the proceedings. I am not sure what you have been told, but I'd love the chance to talk directly to the represented individual. Thanks!

For future clients, I'd ask that you review all of our five star reviews from actual clients.

reviews.text: My case far surpassed a reasonable timeline and was met repeatedly by obstacles from the Judge presiding, the opposition, and numerous continuances out of the control my counsel. These never once deterred the vigilance, determination, and attendance to my defense by the attorney and supporting staff at The Law Office Of Nicole Daussin. Through the fear of uncertainty and the pain of inconsistency by the courts, this firm provided the strength I needed and composure I at times lacked to stay the course and I feel no efforts were spared in pursuit of what was right, just, and fair. The understanding I received from these people even in my struggles to keep them compensated will forever be appreciated and not soon forgotten. For the exemplary counsel and tremendous support throughout one of the more difficult experiences of my life I solemnly salute you and humbly extend my gratitude for helping me get my son back. Thank you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words. It was an honor to help you.

reviews.text: I had the pleasure of seeing Seth as the attorney in a case and he was absolutely incredible. He was diligent, calculated and prepared.  It was impressive to say the least.  Meghan is so informative and diligent in taking care of all paperwork, correspondence and explaining things. This group is really in it for you.  The team they have are professional, kind and so very helpful.  Thank you guys for all your hard work!

reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Whitney, it's disappointing to see this review hasn't been removed as you indicated during our phone conversation where you acknowledged it was accidental. It's now clear, with your name and photo change, that you are connected to the opposing party who was not successful in their case against our client. We cherish feedback from all sources, and while we particularly value the positive experiences of the clients we've won for, even this review from someone associated with an unsuccessful opposing party serves as a reminder of our effectiveness in court. If you are seeking legal representation with a proven track record, please call us today at 907-268-2538 for your consultation.

reviews.text: My pleasure to give Seth and Meghan at Dinkel Law the highest recommendation for the outstanding law firm that they run. Their professional expertise, compassion, and personable demeanor is of the highest caliber. Truly a pleasure to work with them in a difficult time in my life.

Very professional, knowledgeable, and kept me informed as the case progressed. Any info was made immediately available to me and I was always kept in the loop as to the path forward. Highly recommend Seth Dinkel, and his paralegal...Ms Pickens!!

Mr. Dinkel and his paralegal Ms. Pickens, did amazing work for our civil case. They were both diligent and professional. Communication was concise and timely, Mr. Dinkel heard everything we wanted and worked to get most of just with in very short notice and not a lot of prep time due to the nature of the case. HIGHLY recommend Mr. Dinkel and his paralegal.
Wholeheartedly recommend Seth Dinkel! He is a thorough professional who leaves no stone unturned.

Seth is an amazing attorney. He listened intently as I presented the details of my case. He asked all the right questions and jumped in. He handled it with amazing professionalism and expertise. In my opinion, you can not ask for better representation.

Mr. Dinkel was absolutely wonderful to work with. He listened to me, offered sound advice, communicated effectively throughout the entire process and really had my best interest at heart. His paralegal, Meghan, was super helpful. Any time I needed to speak to her or had questions, she responded in a timely manner and was always very professional. I would recommend Mr. Dinkel and Meghan to anyone! 10/10

Seth Dinkel genuinely cares about his clients and understands the emotional complexities involved in family law cases. His expertise and attention to detail are evident.

If you’re seeking a compassionate, knowledgeable, and effective family law attorney, look no further than Mr. Dinkel! He truly makes a difference in his clients' lives.

Seth Dinkel worked with me on custody issues I was facing and I couldn't be happier! He had great results, but besides that he was the first attorney I've employed that actually worked with me instead of just taking my money and telling me what he was going to do.

He explained all options, told me what he would do or what he thought would be best, then asked how I wanted to go ahead. It seems like common sense, but most attorneys don't work like that. They prefer to just take your money and tell you what they're doing.

I would definitely recommend this law firm to anyone needing legal help and I will retain them again in the future if I need to.

Seth Dinkel is an honest, hardworking, and kind attorney and friend. He strives, and succeeds, to go above and beyond for each and every one of his clients. Seth works tirelessly on his cases to produce the best outcome for his clients. He always has his client's best interests at the forefront of his mind throughout the entire duration of the case, no matter how long or ugly it may get. Whether you need criminal defense, support through a pending divorce, or other legal help, Seth Dinkel is the right attorney for you.
I highly recommend Seth Dinkel. He is honest, sincere, and an excellent attorney.  He knows how to help through a very difficult time with clarity for the best results.

my husband and I were passengers in a car accident that turned our world upside down. We both lost our jobs and had a baby on the way. I would highly recommend this Law Office to anyone and everyone. He is honest and fast working. We love the office ladies too. He fixed our lives and there is no way to truly thank him  for that. reviews.text: Didn't even talk to me. I spent more time filling out their form they requested me to fill out, and by the time I drove to office 9 min away to drop off legal documents the front desk told me they would not entertain my case. No reason just have a good day.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your feedback. After reviewing the information you submitted, our attorneys determined that we would not be able to take on your matter. Completing an intake form does not establish an attorney-client relationship, and unfortunately we are unable to accept every application we receive. We understand this can be frustrating and wish you the best in finding representation that’s a good fit for your needs.

reviews.text: I’ll give them the compliment of attentiveness but it ends there. The receptionist seems like she doesn’t want to be there and couldn’t care less about what you’re going through. She said my case had been denied with the reason “not available” and a plead of ignorance about what it meant. I asked if I can get any further information from someone else but was denied. “I don’t know why they don’t want your case and they won’t be calling you to tell you” is unprofessional for a law firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. Webster,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. I’m sorry to hear that your experience with our office did not meet your expectations.

To clarify, our administrative staff is not permitted to provide legal advice or details regarding case-review decisions. Their role is limited to conveying whether our attorneys are able to move forward with a consultation. Decisions about accepting or declining potential matters are made solely by our attorneys after reviewing the intake information provided.

In your situation, the attorneys determined that we would not be able to assist, and we notified you promptly in order to avoid having you incur any consultation fees unnecessarily. We understand that this can be disappointing, but we aim to be transparent and efficient so that you can pursue other options without delay.

We wish you the very best in finding representation that fits your needs.

reviews.text:

reviews.text: Seth Dinkle at Collier Law represented me during multiple child custody cases. He did an excellent job and was instrumental to securing joint custody. He listened well to the details of my case and gave good counsel. In court he pursued the truth and made sure to establish the details of my case through evidence and testimony. He only billed for the services he provided and was accurate with the time charged. I would recommend Seth without reservation.
Didn’t show up for court and didn’t call till my son was already at the court house and in the court room. He had been paid in full up front. Highly unprofessional.

reviews.text: Working with Mr. Dinkel was a great experience during a very stressful period of time. His legal expertise was invaluable but additionally he was also able to give unbiased, and what I thought to be very morally sound, advise each step of the way. Communication was fast. Anytime there was paperwork submitted they would forward within minutes. Payments and invoices were easy as well. The admins at Collier were very patient and helped me understand exactly how the retainer and trust account were funded and when. Overall, this law office was able to help us feel comfortable during the time when we really need it. Thank you so much, will definitely be coming back if we require legal help in the future.

I was in need of mortgage information for my divorce and two subpoenas. I paid $11,000 and nothing was ever done. I told him that $5000 was the last penny I had. I even told him that I would do anything to help lighten his load and make it cheaper and instead made it more expensive. I would not recommend this attorney as he is a thief. I didn’t get anything worth $5000 much less $11,000. All he did was charge me for stuff that wasn’t done and all I got at the end was a binder with a USB drive with the document that I provided to them to begin with. All they did was edit it. I intend to file a small claims court case against him.
The value his services was very poor. On a scale of 5 to 10 I’d give him a 2!!! Do not trust this attorney!! I will keep you updated on my case against Mr. Collier.

My experience with Collier law has been an absolute breeze. Jeremy and all of the personnel working in his office have been an absolute pleasure to work with. They have been  incredibly helpful, supportive and professional, all the personnel is extremely knowledgeable and have guided me through some tough times without judgment or hesitation. They’ve kept my obligations on the forefront while looking out for my best interest. They have ensured that I understand everything in my case and did a wonderful job keeping me in the know in all aspects, as you can imagine any/all law guidelines or court obligations can be overwhelming for individuals that are not familiar with the standard civics, they’ve done a wonderful job breaking down the specifics into Lehman’s terms to guarantee I understand my case. Coming to their office as someone that has never needed any support from a lawyer I couldn’t be happier that I chose this firm to represent me, they will have my business no matter the situation. You can’t go wrong with this top shelf representation!!

These people are amazing!

We won 100% of what we asked for and then some. I can't recommend Collier Law enough. I know what breathing easy feels like for the first time in a long time because I have them on my team 💕💕💕

Yes it's a business, and business is to make money but integrity is a huge asset, and makes Mr. Collier stand apart from other legal representation I have had in the past. I would highly recommend his services.
Excellent attorney. Definitely recommend! Helped me tremendously through my family court proceedings
Thank you for making my daughter and me feel heard, safe and cared for. Jeff has a way of fighting for you while not overwhelming you in the process. Thanks for being on our team, Jeff.

I worked primarily with Jared, and he is awesome! After 1.5 years of fighting with insurance companies and all that neat fun crap they have to deal with, I got a pretty decent settlement. They were so kind, very straightforward and always answered my questions and explained stuff to me in an easy to understand way. Overall I had a great experience working with them. I'd give 10 stars if I could.

reviews.text: Excellent experience associated to a relatively serious auto accident. Initially started to negotiate what I thought should be a straight forward simple settlement. Not so. The complications started immediately with all agencies involved needing payment for services rendered. Initial settlement offers from insurance adjusters typically very low. My appeal to the Crowson Group very pleasant and simple. The whole process very efficient, personal and end results exceeded all my expectations.

reviews.text: I have been the unfortunate victim in two car accidents in 3 years. I saw an ad for lowe law group and started with them just to get dropped months later due to circumstances, that's when I found crowson. I 1000 percent recommend them. Communication 10/10. Have your back 10/10. They checked in with me monthly as I was healing my injury. They handle everything and it's smooth easy and worth the 1/4 of whatever is settled. 1000 percent. They have the knowledge and will fight for you. Thank you crowson law for getting me through a second injury settlement!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the review!!

reviews.text:
From start to finish, this office made a stressful situation incredibly easy to deal with. My main point of contact throughout the case was Christa and she handled everything, explained each step clearly, and always made sure I understood what was going on. I never felt left in the dark. She was always available when I called with any questions or concerns. I can't say enough good things about her and how grateful I am to have her help through the entire process.

This team is incredibly smart and knows how to obtain the best possible outcome,  What really sets them apart though is how much they genuinely care about people. They took the time to check in, answer questions, and make sure I understood everything along the way.

I would absolutely recommend them to anyone who’s been in an accident and needs the help of an attorney who is professional, responsive, and truly cares. When the entire process concluded and everything was finished, I walked out of their office feeling that they really put people over profits.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to leave feedback. At CLG, we believe that an informed and educated client is a satisfied client. Christa is a very experienced professional, and one of our best representatives when it comes to being accessible, knowledgeable and patient for our clients. We are so happy the you had a good experience with CLG.

reviews.text: Very helpful and made the process much less of a headache. Thankful for crowson. I even referred two people!
reviews.ownerResponse: Referring others is the best compliment that you can give. Thank you so much for that- and for your review!

reviews.text: My experience with Crowson Law Group was Excellent!! Everyone there from the people at the front desk to the ones behind the scenes, taking care of all the paper work, phone calls, negotiations. Treated me with such compassion and kindness! I had most of my dealings with Alejandro, and he was amazing! Always answered any questions and always kept me up to date with any new news. They closed my case within 30 days or close to it. I love these guys! And would recommend them to anyone who is in any kind of accident. They will take care of you! 100%!
reviews.ownerResponse: Yeah, Alejandro is great, right? He has been with us for 13 years, and has seen it all. Thank you for the kind words about the other staff members, too. We are so happy that we met with your expectations. But, honestly, 30 DAYS? We hope everyone doesn't expect that kind of timeline. That is unusually fast. 😊

reviews.text: Honest and kind service.  Very professional and prompt.
reviews.ownerResponse: Shawna: thank you for turning to us to help. It is always humbling when someone comes to us for assistance! And thank you for taking a moment to leave a review!
Thank you for the feedback!

reviews.text:
I was in an accident a little over two years ago and my entire life shifted.

It was painful, overwhelming and I wasn’t sure how I was going to navigate through everything that was happening. But from the moment I called, the wonderful team at Crowson Law Group was there - steady, supportive and unwavering. What stood out the most was how they treated me. Not once did I feel like my voice didn’t matter. Not once did I feel brushed aside, ignored, or minimized. Every concern was met with patience and clarity. They made me feel understood and supported in every step of my case. When everything was coming to a close, they processed my settlement and made sure that I had a positive outcome.

They have shown me genuine compassion beyond professional courtesy and got me back on my feet after one of the hardest chapters of my life. If you are in need of legal representation, there's no one better than Crowson Law Group. They don't just care about cases, they care about people and I will always be grateful for what they’ve done for me.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for this review. It means so much when our clients show appreciation like this. Things don’t always go exactly to plan, but we always try our best, and it is gratifying to hear that it is seen. Thanks again and please have the very best of luck going forward!

reviews.text: After being rear ended and the other person’s insurance not wanting to pay my medical bills. Alejandro was amazing and got all my medical bills paid and then some. I can’t thank the Crowson law group enough! They are a great team to work with.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review! We are proud to have been any to help you.

reviews.text: Two sentences in less than 1 minute from these people!! Yes, we can help, can I get your name?  The 2nd sentence says,"Oh I'm sorry,  we deal with slip and fall cases". Apparently they aren't true attys., but robots
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Ms. Davidson, this is Claire Crowson. May I please ask you to help me better understand the issue so that we can give a better experience to others who reach out for our help? Are you referring to the Chat feature on our website or something else? I am confused because we do not use AI chatbots, although we do have operators who man the chat line from a third-party vendor to get the chatter to a live case intake person. That is a system that has worked well up until this incident, to our knowledge. We will review this system as a result of your review, but could you please take a moment more to describe your interaction and frustration with our chatter?

reviews.text: After struggling to get the party at fault's insurance to just pay for the medical bills, I realized I needed help. Crowson was on it and so informative every step of the way, they made sure to lay out all options for me and how those options would affect me, or how long things might take. I was never expecting a personal settlement, but was pleasantly surprised with one at the end of things. More than I was ever expecting. Thank you to Mike Garland especially, he was such a great advocate on my behalf.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for taking time to review us. Mike is top-notch, no doubt.

Praise God, my baby girl is alive and I’m feeling better after long time recovery treatment. I’m so happy when I found The Crowson Law Group because they helped me and was professional, considerate handling my case very well. Attorney James W. Crowson is very forthright about every aspect of my case. He is one of the most prepared Lawyers I have ever met, he handled my case with, what seemed to me, to be the utmost care and attention. He isn't someone that will take your case and have you wondering what is happening with your case or what he is doing. He’s busy, but that is because she is good. He and staff were absolutely professional and personable. The Crowson Law Group staff is just as prepared and driven as he is. You will not find a better Lawyer anywhere guaranteed for your car accident in Anchorage area. My case turned out better than I had hoped for. I would recommend him highly. If you need a real competent lawyer in Alaska his is my choice.

reviews.text: The team there has been great working me through the legal process with professionalism and compassion
Our family had a very sensitive and difficult case.  Every single person at Denali Law was knowledgeable and respectful of our situation.  I would highly recommend Denali Law.
Please go ANYWHERE else!
They did a family trust for me and it was painless I would use them again in a heartbeat
We had a Revokable trust set up by Karlee. It was a fantastic experience from start to finish. I highly recommend Denali Law  and Karlee Specifically!

Denali Law Group helped us write a comprehensive and sustainable child and student protection policy.  The attention to detail, ability to answer a wide range of questions, and the amount of research that went into writing the policy was incredible.  Karlee was amazing :)

Mr. Petersen had my best interest.  He actively listened and supported us through our court case. I always knew the direction we were going next and it was communicated to be within a timely manner . I am so grateful that he was willing to help and go ubove and beyond.
Everyone was very kind and super helpful with all my questions! Affordable consultation fee and definitely a wonderful attorney!

Tried to use this agency for a will. First issue is they kept calling and saying the attorney was called in to emergency hearings and needed to reschedule. Later found out they were taking family leave but thought it wouldn't be received well so decided to lie.

Then they sent the will draft with all that private info to a strangers email. And they had really basic info wrong like the home address.

They've been apologetic after each mistake but overall it was not a good experience and I'll end up paying to have  the will re-done by another agency as, after so many problems, I've lost trust that that parts I don't understand are without issue.
Always so kind and helpful.
Denali law group helped me out with my situation and there professional and knowledgeable about cases they deal with

I have a case that is approximately a year old. I have talked to my lawyer into a trial. Although my conference for my trial is in 5 days my lawyer does not know any information about the case including the fact that the police officer did not pull me over and the fact that no one saw me drive. Let alone the fact that the first officer had told me to drive home twice. I have maybe got to talk to her for approximately 15 minutes of which 10 of it was just making sure that she had her facts right

Nobody plans ahead when it comes to legal issues until they come, but when they happen, it’s best to have best and most experienced team on your side. After being charged with 3 criminal charges and challenging family situation, attorney Marisa Chud from Denali law group spent great amount of time to learn more about my case before I was even committed to hire them. After working for over 1.5 years with Marisa and her aid, I believe I ended up with outstanding results. Combined experience within the law firm is very high, and it’s important to have a long term strategy when starting complicated legal battles. I honestly don’t wish anyone to have to go through long and expensive process like I had to go through, but I didn’t have better options. It’s best to follow advice that they give and be ready to prepare paperwork, witnesses and supporting documents ahead of time for better outcome in the courtroom.
Timely and thorough legal counsel. Very helpful working with this team to receive sound and technical counsel that assisted me to chart a good and accurate route forward.

I am so incredibly grateful for Denali Law Group. Our attorney Marisa Chud was amazing. She took on our case and took on our fight as if it were her own family she was fighting for.
Throughout the entire process of our case, Marisa and her paralegal Lisa, were always there for us and exactly who we needed.

When it came time to retain an attorney for my child custody modification, I was somewhat trepidatious. My experience with another law firm for my divorce left me feeling cynical and a bit used. I was just told what I wanted to hear, not adequately informed, and charged a tremendous amount for it. My experience with Marisa Chud and her assistant Mary couldn't be more opposite from my first experience. For the first time in seven years, I felt heard. I didn't just have a lawyer, I had an advocate who was straightforward and compassionate. I couldn't recommend Marisa and Mary highly enough. They were wonderful and I was blessed to have them all my legal team.

Without getting too much into the details of my case, it was uphill, challenging, and incredibly stressful. My previous legal counsel was unable to assist when I had new challenges in my case because he was retiring. He referred me to Denali Law Group. I was apprehensive to switch, but it was well worth it.

The paralegal, Mary, was incredibly empathetic, supportive, organized, and thorough, and always returned my calls and emails quickly. Jon-Marc was also so very supportive, methodical in his approach, was quick to manage curveballs that came our way, and did a fantastic job advocating for me in court. They were always honest and direct with me. We had a challenging case but the end result was in my favor as a result of their diligence. The firm was also accommodating of my needs and receptive to my requests. I'm thrilled with the service provided and can move forward in my life stress-free.

Denali did a very fast and effective job with my divorce.  All my questions were answered timely and professionally.  I mainly dealt with Mrs. Almeida and she is phenomenal.  She made the painful difficult decision so much easier and clarified all decisions that were made.

Denali Law Group did an outstanding job with my divorce. My attorney, Jon-Marc Petersen was knowledgeable, empathetic, honest, skilled and effective. Attorney Marisa Chud also worked on my behalf. She was thorough, knowledgeable, dedicated and helpful. Jon-Marc and Marisa followed through with everything they told me they would do. They listened, answered my questions, and let me know what to expect throughout the process. If you need an attorney, they are the best. Mary Almeida, paralegal, was also an integral part of my legal team. She was professional, detailed, compassionate, and a fierce advocate to have on your team. She answered every call and email promptly, answered my questions thoroughly, and provided support and encouragement when the situation seemed overwhelming. Mary also kept me well-informed about all costs related to my account's expenses. I appreciated how much careful consideration went into trying to keep the costs/fees to me reasonable. Jon-Marc, Marisa, Mary, and every other staff member I encountered treated me with respect and kindness in every interaction. They did an excellent job, and I highly recommend Denali Law Group.

I worked with Jon Marc on my custody modification case. He was affordable, knowledgeable, professional and honest. He never sugar coated anything but remained realistic with me the entire time. He was compassionate and made court so much more comfortable. His paralegal Mrs. Almeida was wonderful and professional. She always made time for any concerns and she did a lot of the work, which saved money. The billing was flawless and I never wondered where one penny went. In the end Jon Marc was able to help me achieve what I hoped to. In sensitive matters, it is so important to have a team you can trust and this is definitely it!
This firm has some of the most knowledgeable staff. They are kind and ready to help. They genuinely care for their clients.

John Mark Peterson is an excellent divorce lawyer and a highly empathetic man. The price is reasonable for the service you recieve. Secretary Christina is wonderful, she's consistently available and very considerate of others. Best in the Valley.
not in need of clients from what I could find.
Professional.
Every helpful

I love Denali Law!

Jon Marc has helped me with stressful and serious situations, I rely on him/his staff for all of my legal needs, they are responsive and reasonably priced, well worth it!

The team is also very kind.  If you need legal advice it’s worth a consultation to get to know them for sure!
I am very glad to have this time of needing representation behind me.  They did a great job and I would recommend them.  The wheels of justice turn slowly and they kept at it for years to help me.

Michael really helped me out.

Thank you.
Amazing staff. Jon-Marc and Christina together, made the processing of my car accident go as smooth as possible. I appreciate all the hard work Denali Law Group did to represent myself and my family.

My  experiances  with Denali Law Group were always forthright and honest.
Always Appreciated John Marks candor and his ability to explain things as i needed to understand.

Denali Law was absolutely professional in all aspects of my situation. They made me feel welcome and that my situation was just as important to them as it was to me. Kept me informed on every step they were taking, and even brought things to my attention that I would have not known. Always welcomed any questions I had, got back with me immediately, and always made me feel like a had a great team truly working for me and with me. They did more than I could ever ask. Denali Law is truly a great team and my experience with them couldn't have been any better!! I highly recommend Denali Law and if I'm ever in need of law services again, I will be going right back to Denali Law.

When I walked into Jon-Marc’s offices I find him about my experiences with attorneys and how I felt like they told me I could get something that I couldn’t actually get. I asked him to always be so honest with me that it hurts. He did just that and I was never once lead astray. I worked with Jon-Marc and Mary, his paralegal and I felt they answered every question very thoroughly and put every fear to rest. Having their counsel made me more confident walking into a courtroom. Jon-Marc is extremely well educated in law and truly wants the best and most fair outcome. Never once did I feel like I was being told I could get what I was asking and I didn’t get it. Every plan that was laid out for me went exactly how we wanted. I will always recommend this group of hard working attorneys and paralegals to anyone that asks! They really have your best interest at heart!
No help

They did an excellent job.  The paralegal was used for most of the process which saved me lots of money.  Ms. Almeida kept in contact with me and walked me step by step with what was needed.  In the process, she diminished a lot of my anxiety.  Mr. Jon Marc was extremely professional and understanding with my concerns and led me to a very successful divorce trial as nothing appeased my spouse to settle.
Law office is just terrible very bad service wouldn't recommend them period

REMEMBER TO SHUT UP!!!(WHEN TALKING TO COPS)  I was terrified when I got arrested and had done absolutely nothing wrong! Alycia Cole(Look at the bottom of their page on their site....should be higher!!!) WANTED to represent me after looking at the case once! We took it to trial and it was a DUH!!! NOT GUILTY!!!! I very highly recommend Mr. Vanwey for your legal services.  After months of trying to recover my property, he had negotiated it's returned in less than 24 hours and within days my property was back in my possession after being held hostage by the absentee storage property owner.  His amazing negotiating skills were a critical part of the process, he has excellent communication with you every step of the way and very reasonable billing rates.  I can't recommend him highly enough. If you need legal help, he is definitely your guy.  Thank you Kaden!

Arctic Law was impressively quick, efficient and highly effective taking care of my legal needs. They made me feel like I was more than a case number. Every detail mattered. My situation was handled professionally and resolved with care.

I had the privilege of attending law school with Kaden and have watched him practice law for nearly two years now. Throughout that time, he has consistently demonstrated a strong commitment to putting his clients’ interests first. Kaden is thoughtful, efficient, and careful. His integrity and work ethic set him apart, and I would trust him with any of my own legal needs. I highly recommend him to anyone looking for a dedicated and trustworthy attorney.
Had an issue that needed some assistance. Arctic Law provided excellent communication and helped me with the issue at hand. Saved me both a lot of stress and money. Thanks, Arctic Law!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hey Jake, it was a pleasure being able to serve you and bring resolution to your issue.

reviews.text: Kaden helped me get on my feet with Real Estate by helping me with lease agreements and understanding my rights and responsibilities as a landlord. His communication with me as a client was amazing, and unlike any other attorney I have ever worked with.
reviews.ownerResponse: It was a pleasure working with you.

reviews.text: Kaden is an absolute joy and pleasure to work with. As an attorney, he exemplifies excellence in his work, and is consistent on communication even accommodating after hours calls due to my work schedule. I highly recommend him for any legal needs.
reviews.ownerResponse: It has been a pleasure working with you.
